ddls:
CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  "parent_department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent department (for hierarchical structure) */,
  "budget" INTEGER /* Annual budget allocated to the department */,
  "headcount" INTEGER /* Number of employees in the department */,
  "department_head_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department head */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_parent_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_roles" (
  "job_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job role */,
  "job_role_name" TEXT /* Name of the job role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the job role */,
  "job_role_level" TEXT /* Level of the job role (e.g., junior, senior, lead) */,
  "required_education_level" TEXT /* Minimum education level required for the job role */,
  "required_experience_years" INTEGER /* Minimum years of experience required for the job role */,
  "salary_range_low" INTEGER /* Lower bound of the salary range for the job role */,
  "salary_range_high" INTEGER /* Upper bound of the salary range for the job role */,
  "is_remote" INTEGER /* Whether the job role can be performed remotely */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education_fields" (
  "education_field_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education field */,
  "education_field_name" TEXT /* Name of the education field */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the education field */,
  "required_degree" TEXT /* Degree required in the education field */,
  "common_specializations" TEXT /* Common specializations within the education field */,
  "average_education_duration" INTEGER /* Average duration of education in years */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_field_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_ratings" (
  "performance_rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance rating */,
  "performance_rating_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance rating */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the performance rating */,
  "performance_threshold" INTEGER /* Minimum performance score required for the rating */,
  "performance_impact" TEXT /* Impact of the rating on salary, promotions, etc. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_rating_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_involvements" (
  "job_involvement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job involvement level */,
  "job_involvement_name" TEXT /* Name of the job involvement level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the job involvement level */,
  "involvement_score" INTEGER /* Numerical score representing the level of job involvement */,
  "involvement_impact" TEXT /* Impact of the involvement level on performance and engagement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_involvement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "work_life_balances" (
  "work_life_balance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each work-life balance rating */,
  "work_life_balance_name" TEXT /* Name of the work-life balance rating */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the work-life balance rating */,
  "balance_score" INTEGER /* Numerical score representing the work-life balance */,
  "balance_impact" TEXT /* Impact of the work-life balance on employee well-being and retention */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("work_life_balance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "budget" INTEGER /* Budget allocated to the project */,
  "project_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project manager */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., ongoing, completed, delayed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_sessions" (
  "training_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training session */,
  "training_name" TEXT /* Name of the training session */,
  "training_description" TEXT /* Description of the training session */,
  "training_date" TEXT /* Date of the training session */,
  "trainer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trainer */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the training session in hours */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the training session was held */,
  "attendance_count" INTEGER /* Number of employees who attended the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("training_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_project" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the employee */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the project */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the employee in the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the employee started working on the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the employee ended working on the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the employee's involvement in the project (e.g., active, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id", "project_id")
)
